description: Ensure index.html is the Portal, not a converted document.
fix_suggestion: The index.html file seems to be overwritten by a document conversion. Check if 'Index.md' exists in the root and rename it to 'Home.md'. Restore 'index.html' using the template.

description: Detects if PowerShell object properties (metadata) were serialized into the HTML instead of content.
fix_suggestion: The HTML contains PowerShell object metadata. In Agent_DocBuilder.ps1, ensure 'Get-Content' uses '-Raw' and casts to '[string]' before 'ConvertTo-Json'.

description: Detects common encoding artifact characters (Replacement Character or GBK/UTF-8 mismatches).
fix_suggestion: Encoding issue detected. Ensure all scripts use 'Set-Content -Encoding UTF8' and source files are saved as UTF-8.
